title: olearia alpina
intro: Olearia alpina, also known as Alpine Tree Daisy or Mountain Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand and Australia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as phenolic acids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Olearia alpina include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory conditions, while also exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Olearia alpina can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
